title: Most people get these 3 AI terms wrong
summary: Jeff Su clarifies three commonly misunderstood AI terms. Hallucination shares mechanisms with creativity and differs by task needs. Context window works as a fixed-size buffer that drops old information when full. Tokens are AI processing chunks whose usage drives plan limitations.
